# Firestore Schema Design: Alter_sportsplay

## Collections

### 1. `Matches` (Collection)
Stores metadata for each match. Used to replace HOME/AWAY text with actual team names during event parsing.

**Document ID:** Auto-generated by Firestore (or standard UUID)

```json
{
  "match_name": "Asian Games Final 2026",
  "match_date": "2026-03-23T15:00:00Z",
  "home_team": "KOR",
  "away_team": "JPN",
  "video_urls": {
    "tactical_cam": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=...",
    "broadcast_cam": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=..."
  },
  "video_offsets": {
    "tactical_cam": 15.5,
    "broadcast_cam": -2.0
  },
  "rosters": {
    "home": [
      { "player_id": "p01", "number": 7, "name": "Kim" }
    ],
    "away": [
      { "player_id": "p02", "number": 10, "name": "Sato" }
    ]
  },
  "created_at": "timestamp"
}
```

### 2. `Events` (Collection)
Stores individual event fragments parsed from Sportscode XML or CSV. Each event is stored as an individual document to allow massive scale querying.

**Document ID:** Auto-generated

```json
{
  "match_id": "REFERENCE_TO_MATCH_DOC_ID",
  "code": "Shot on Goal", // e.g., "Shooting", "Penalty Corner"
  "team": "KOR",          // Corrected from HOME/AWAY during parsing using Match metadata
  "player": "Kim",        // Optional: Can be tracked separately if XML provides ID/Number
  "start_time": 125.4,    // Measured in Seconds
  "end_time": 130.2,      // Measured in Seconds
  "duration": 4.8,
  "labels": {
    "Outcome": "Goal",
    "Zone": "Circle"
  },
  "created_at": "timestamp"
}
```
